title: Pentovideo Project Config
description: Per-project configuration for a Pentovideo project (pentovideo.json). Tells `pentovideo add` which registry to pull items from and where to drop them in the project tree. Created by `pentovideo init`; users may edit it to point at custom registries or reshape their project layout.

registry.description: Base URL of the registry to pull items from. Point at the official Pentovideo registry or a custom one.

paths.description: Target paths for each item type, relative to the project root.

assets.description: Where asset files (images, fonts, videos) land. Defaults to `assets`.
